The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a number of cross-boundary passengers using public transport services to travel via the land boundary control points during and around the Chinese Mid-Autumn Festival. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to / from the Mainland / Macao via the land boundary control points will also increase substantially. The TD has put in place the corresponding traffic and transport arrangements. Travelers are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. 

Local residents and visitors should particularly note that only MTR local lines and some Light Rail routes will provide overnight services on the evening of the Chinese Mid-Autumn Festival (i. e. the evening of 17 September). Airport Express Line, Disneyland Resort Line, and the services of East Rail Line to and from Lu Wu and Lok Ma Chau Stations will only maintain normal service hours. The departure times of the last trains of East Rail Line to and from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau Stations are given as follows:

For more details, please visit: https://www.td.gov.hk/en/special_news/spnews.htm

The public can make use of "HKeMobility" to access the snapshots of traffic conditions at the inbound and outbound vehicle plaza of HZMB Hong Kong Port, and they can also check the real time situations of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the service on real-time immigration clearance status of HZMB Zhuhai Port or「Zhuhai fa bu」WeChat official accounts (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/),inorder to plan their journeys ahead. 

Members of the public are also advised that, subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 13 September to the early morning of 19 September 2024 to facilitate public transport vehicles to enter the above control points smoothly. Motorists are advised to pay special attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the road. 

Members of the public are also advised to keep in view the latest traffic news through radio, television broadcasts and TD's "HKeMobility" mobile application.

運輸署預計在中秋節及前後，將有大量跨境乘客使用公共運輸服務經各陸路管制站往返內地／澳門，而經各陸路管制站往返內地／澳門的跨境私家車亦會顯著增加，運輸署已作出相應交通及運輸安排，並在此呼籲旅客及早規劃行程，盡量選擇於非繁忙時段出行。

市民及旅客需特別留意，中秋節當晚（即9月17日晚）港鐡只有本地鐵路綫及部分輕鐵路綫提供通宵服務。機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫來往羅湖及落馬洲站的服務只會維持正常服務時間。東鐵綫來往落馬洲及羅湖站的尾班車開出時間詳列如下：

詳情請參看: https://www.td.gov.hk/tc/special_news/spnews.htm

市民可透過「香港出行易」查閱港珠澳大橋香港口岸出境及入境客車通關廣場的交通快拍，以及透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況，以便及早計劃行程。

市民亦請注意，視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸由2024年9月13日起至9月19日凌晨，或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述口岸。駕駛人士請特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Handy tips for buying High Speed Rail tickets and travelling during holidays
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 假日購票及乘車小貼士

2024-09-17T15:31:00.CONTENT_EN: A large number of passengers will be at the West Kowloon Station and travel on the High Speed Rail to enter the Mainland during the holidays. Please note the following before your journey: 1. Allow more time for immigration procedures. You may enter the gate at Level B1 120 minutes before the train departs at the earliest 2. Visit 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app for the latest train schedule and service adjustment You may buy HSR tickets up to 15 days before departure at different ticketing channels: 1. Please buy tickets through the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app, or through appointed travel agents (Click here) 2. If you would like to buy tickets at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station, you may use: · Self-service Ticket Machines: bring valid and original travel documents of all passengers; only e-payment methods are accepted (for example, contactless credit cards, WeChat Pay and Alipay) · Ticketing Counters: a longer waiting time is expected
2024-09-17T15:31:00.CONTENT_CN: 假日期間，香港西九龍站會有較多旅客。出發乘搭高速鐵路前往內地前，需注意: 1.預留足夠時間辦理出入境手續，旅客最早可於開車前120分鐘於B1層入閘 2.瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式查看最新的列車班次及車務調動資訊 如需購買高速鐵路15天內車票: 1.建議使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，或透過指定代理購票(按此) 2.如前往香港西九龍站購票，可使用： ·自助售票機：需帶備所有乘車人士的有效旅遊證件正本；只接受電子支付（如感應式信用卡、微信支付及支付寶） ·票務櫃位：預計輪候時間可能會較長
